problem.title: Create and Traverse Singly Linked List
problem.description:
Problem: Create and Traverse Singly Linked List

Input:
- First line: integer n
- Second line: n space-separated integers

Output:
- Print the result

Example:
Input:
5
10 20 30 40 50

Output:
10 20 30 40 50

solution.explanation: Read values into a static array of node structs, link them by setting next pointers, then traverse from head printing each data.
